description: A vintage-style illustrated travel poster showing a painted river gorge scene with a hilltop castle on a steep cliff, a village with red roofs along the water and snow-capped mountains in the distance, with a propeller airliner in the sky. Large red text at the top reads GERMANY with an italic line below reading FREE flight + $2,600! A faint line at the bottom reads DHS.GOV/CBPHOME.
